positive: A whimsical and stylized composition featuring a trio of cute, abstract woodland animals—a gentle fox, a playful owl, and a smiling bunny—silhouetted against a gradient sunset sky. The animals are arranged in a gentle arc, leaping and interacting. Below them, stylized floral vines, glowing mushrooms, and minimalist celestial bodies complete the scene. The style is inspired by modern folk illustration, vector art, and mid-century Scandinavian design, emphasizing clean lines, bold solid shapes, and limited color palette (deep indigo, warm gold, soft teal, burnt orange). Use strong, crisp silhouettes for all subjects, ensuring perfect separation from the background. The composition must be highly centralized, symmetrical, and graphic, ideal for an apparel print. Clean, flat colors, maximum contrast, high detail, award-winning illustration.
negative: blur, low quality, noisy, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, extra limbs, messy, grainy, hyperrealistic, photo, photorealism, logo, trademark, text overlay
